name: The Dragon Dwelling in the Deep
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>海</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>かい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>底</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>てい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>に<ruby lang="jp"><rb>潜</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ひそ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>む<ruby lang="jp"><rb>深</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>海</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>かい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>竜</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>りゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
name_jp_tl: The Deep-Sea Dragon Dwelling on the Seabed
desc: Place 1 Ocean Counter on this card during each player's Standby Phase. When this card is removed from the field, all Fish-Type and Sea Serpent-Type monsters you control gain 200 ATK for each Ocean Counter on this card, until the End Phase.
mnst_eff: Place 1 Ocean Counter on this card during each player's Standby Phase. When this card is removed from the field, all Fish-Type and Sea Serpent-Type monsters you control gain 200 ATK for each Ocean Counter on this card, until the End Phase.
eff: Place 1 Ocean Counter on this card during each player's Standby Phase. When this card is removed from the field, all Fish-Type and Sea Serpent-Type monsters you control gain 200 ATK for each Ocean Counter on this card, until the End Phase.

action: Activates if it leaves the field
